_meta.purpose: The clamp: the human's signed disposition of every governed knob in the Versus Table. The gate holds the live RULES (stable/versus-match.js) against this record — any governed knob that changes without a matching edit here turns the gate red. The measurement (the balance tournament) may PROPOSE a value; shipping it requires transcribing it into this record. A diode: current flows only after the human closes the switch.
_meta.boundary: Procedural, not cryptographic. The gate enforces that RULES equals this record; it cannot verify WHO edited the file. The value is not identity — it is that no governed knob can move without a deliberate, visible edit to a disposition document, which forces a human moment where a silent auto-tune used to be.
_meta.how_to_change_a_knob: 1) run the tournament, read its proposed value; 2) edit RULES in versus-match.js; 3) edit 'governed' here to match; 4) if scoring changed, bump scale_version + re-freeze scale-fixture.json (updating scale_fixture_sha256); 5) APPEND a new signoff_log entry with ratified:true, a real ratification_token, scale = the current version, and governed_sha256 = the sha256 of the sorted-key-canonical 'governed' block. ENFORCED (2026-07-16): the gate goes red unless the NEWEST entry ratifies the EXACT current governed state — no knob moves without a fresh, hash-pinned human disposition. Still procedural, not cryptographic identity (see boundary); a forger can write a matching ratified entry, but nothing moves silently.

signoff_log.action: Clamp installed. Current governed values brought under the signed record.
signoff_log.note: The 0.2 sound-reward tuning — floor((probes-par)/2) — was set by the balance tournament, not by a recorded human disposition. It is UNRATIFIED. The clamp is now live regardless: from this point no governed knob changes without a new signoff_log entry. To ratify the 0.2 value, Jake sets ratified:true and a ratification_token (his initials). To revert instead, restore probes-par and re-baseline. Either is a conscious act; the auto-tune path is closed.

signoff_log.action: RATIFIED. Jake accepted the 0.2 value as his recorded disposition (directed via chat this session), before pushing the Stable.
signoff_log.note: Ratifies sound-reward = floor((probes-par)/2) as the accepted CURRENT value — converting the 2026-07-15 auto-tune into a signed human disposition, closing the governance gap the red team flagged. Scope is honest: this ratifies the value IN PLACE, not that it is optimal. The root-cause fix (raise `par` to reflect a rational hidden-information reader's true probe cost, per witness-suite/SPEC-B-holdout.md) remains OPEN future work; ratifying 0.2 does not close it. The token is a human-readable marker directed by Jake, not cryptographic identity (see _meta.boundary); Jake may amend it to any mark he prefers.

signoff_log.action: RATIFIED scale 0.3 — Versus Table migrated to the region+extremes target model (witness-suite v0.3.1), with one tournament-measured re-tune. Jake directed the migration via chat this session.
signoff_log.note: Scope, stated honestly: (1) PAR SEMANTICS changed — par is now the minimal cover (boundaries + distinct extremes + interiors of uncovered regions), derived through the suite, replacing special.length; 0.2 ledgers are refused by replay rather than silently re-rated. (2) ONE FORMULA CHANGED: the sound-builder reward divisor, floor((probes-par)/2) -> floor((probes-par)/3). Measured, not chosen by taste: under derived par the /2 reward let defensive sound-spam out-earn fair play again (193.6 vs 187.6 in the reference tournament — the exact imbalance the 0.2 tuning existed to prevent); /3 restores the reference players' 0.2-era builder economics and the balance invariants. FLAGGED FOR JAKE: this divisor is the one judgment call in the migration — revert or amend at will; the tournament re-measures either way. (3) The surge protector gained a STALL trip (no new target for 2x SURGE_GRACE_PROBES, derived from the existing grace constant — no new governed knob); required because region credit gives even unaimed play small R, blinding a Gamma-only trip. (4) Closes the SPEC-B-holdout par root-cause item by derivation. Token is a human-readable marker directed by Jake via chat (0.2-ratification precedent); he may amend it.
